title: Command Center — Active memory, inbox triage, and multi-run view
summary: This feature delivery ships Command Center Pipeline orientation surfaces: active-memory and inbox triage read APIs, a guarded pan execute route, and sidebar panels for multi-run selection. The Next.js client stacks ActiveMemoryHeader, InboxTriagePanel, and conditional MultiRunTable above the read-only config panel in…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts.index.json sidecar; three embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec.md evaluated via design-qa and RTL evidence.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-08T10:55:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; staged diff limited to 21 touch-set client paths plus 16 bundled sibling Command Center infrastructure files.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
